sections.kind: Added — Wilayah document fallback & geo map alignment
items: `scripts/address_structured.py` — `has_complete_residence_wilayah()`, `enrich_document_wilayah()`, `infer_document_wilayah_text()`, `municipality_name_from_structured()`, `MUNICIPALITY_ADDRESS_TYPES`: infer kab/kota dari konteks dokumen hanya bila person belum punya alamat domisili lengkap.

`scripts/backfill_document_wilayah.py` — Backfill massal `--all` atau per `--doc-id`: infer wilayah dari judul/deskripsi dokumen (Sambas, Bukittinggi, IKN, dll.); lewati dokumen kementerian nasional tanpa kab/kota lokal.
AGENT.md — Section *Wilayah, structured_address, and geo map*: aturan lintas-pipeline (per-row vs document-level, geo tidak memakai `employer` saja, refresh summary setelah backfill).
`scripts/summary/geo.py` — Peta agregat membaca `structured_address` bertipe `municipality` atau `city` (selaras parser & `samples/person.json`), tidak hanya `city`.
`scripts/process_skd_sambas.py` — Entri baru + `--repair`: isi `structured_address` Kabupaten Sambas bila domisili kosong.
`scripts/process_skd_bukittinggi.py` — `enrich_document_wilayah` untuk Kota Bukittinggi pada roster tanpa alamat per baris.
`web/data/id-city-coords.json` — Koordinat IKN / Ibu Kota Nusantara (-0.9720, 116.7131); roster Otorita IKN memakai label ini (bukan proxy Penajam Paser Utara).
`scripts/process_ikn_batch.py` — `IKN_STRUCTURED_ADDRESS` + koordinat Ibu Kota Nusantara untuk roster IKN tanpa alamat per baris.

sections.kind: Added — Singowangi population roster format support (data_induk_desa)
items: `scripts/parse_data_induk_desa.py` — Auto-detect Marawali vs Singowangi format. Singowangi: sheet "Sheet1", title row "PENDUDUK <DESA>", data starts at row 2 with fixed column mapping (NIK, KK, nama, gender, marital, POB, DOB, religion, family status, education, occupation, address, parents, kecamatan, desa).
`scripts/process_data_induk_desa.py` — Made generic: reads title/description/sheet from meta in parsed JSON instead of hardcoded Marawali values.
`templates/data_induk_desa.json` — Updated notes to mention Singowangi format auto-detection.

sections.kind: Fixed — email edge validation in process scripts
items: `process_prb_pasif.py`: added regex email validation before creating email edges to prevent `Empty local part` / `Invalid domain` validation errors.
Backfilled 63 persons with invalid email edges from this document.

sections.kind: Processed — Ikhtisar LHKPN Kemendagri (Luthpiah 2021, CamScanner OCR)
items: `YCHREbSadcfiIIyOeGvx811P0E0577hjqyGswgkQ.pdf` — 5 persons (Luthpiah + suami + 3 anak). Doc `01KSD32V4PQ50G6PH9JC98W5MQ`. OCR tesseract.

sections.kind: Fixed — parse_lhkpn_ikhtisar tesseract family rows
items: Pola `SUAMI`, `ANAK BUKAN`, baris tanpa nomor; keluarga `MAHASISWA`/`PELAJAR` → `extra` bukan `occupation`.

sections.kind: Processed — PA Banggai Ikhtisar LHKPN (Syamsul Ilmi 2021)
items: PA Banggai `LHKPN_Ilmi_2022.pdf` — 3 persons (Syamsul Ilmi + istri + anak). Doc `01KSD28Y2XKNYDV9BECE0SE3V4`.
Backfilled existing Syamsul Ilmi record: moved validator-rejected top-level `occupation` phrase into scoped employment `extra`; document validation now `VALID`.

sections.kind: Fixed — process_lhkpn_ikhtisar template classification
items: `scripts/process_lhkpn_ikhtisar.py` now always stores template `lhkpn`; court vocabulary in LHKPN reports must not override the dedicated LHKPN processor with `putusan`.

sections.kind: Added — Rekapitulasi Data Keluarga (Scribd, BKKBN-style xlsx)
items: `scripts/parse_rekapitulasi_data_keluarga.py` — 184 sheet `Page 1..184`; NIK, nama, hubungan KK, TTL, JKN, PUS; skip `Page 185`; dedup NIK.
`scripts/process_rekapitulasi_data_keluarga.py` — document + BatchProcessor + bidirectional edges.
Template `rekapitulasi_data_keluarga`
Diproses: Scribd `809866062/Rekapitulasi-Data-Keluarga-4` — 3,159 persons. Doc `01KSD24RC7Z93G5X8T5EY0DES9`. OSINT N/A.

sections.kind: Added — Subsidi Bunga/Margin XLSX parser (Form Sosialisasi, Scribd)
items: `scripts/parse_subsidi_bunga.py` — parser `.xlsx` bank subsidy socialization form: Nama Nasabah, No. KTP (NIK), No. Rekening Pembiayaan, Jumlah Subsidi, Tanggal, Kondisi (Aktif/Meninggal/Kabur/Hilang); dedup by NIK then name.
`scripts/process_subsidi_bunga.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner; 0 phone, 0 email edges.
Template `subsidi_bunga` — keywords: subsidi bunga/margin, form sosialisasi, nasabah, No. KTP.
Diproses: Scribd `529831976/12362-Copy-of-Rekap-Form-Sosialisasi-2` — 3,203 persons. Doc `01KSD1NX8HZW2B2G7QTQBVQNM3`. OSINT N/A (0 phone, 0 email).

sections.kind: Fixed — Validator false positive on Bugis/Makassar names
items: Validator "Contains address" heuristic flags names ending with "DG JALAN" (Daeng Jalan) as row contamination. This is a known Bugis naming pattern — no fix applied yet; logged for validator tuning.

sections.kind: Processed — Ikhtisar LHKPN Kemendagri PPID (Purwanto 2023)
items: PPID Kemendagri `iYkBu3KGm6KrqNm0LmdNSLowp0izvyJVF45fx0YG.pdf` — 4 persons (Purwanto + istri + 2 anak). Doc `01KSD1G6ZNNQBMMTZYG3RH3FTX`. Camat Sematu Jaya, Lamandau.

sections.kind: Fixed — process_lhkpn_ikhtisar occupation validation
items: Jabatan disimpan di `facts.employment.data.position` saja (bukan top-level `occupation`) agar lolos `validate_dataset.py`.

sections.kind: Added — Garansi ke season 2 (Scribd nasabah kredit multi-sheet)
items: `scripts/parse_garansi_season2.py` — parser xlsx 3 sheet: CC laki-laki, DEPOSITO, supply toko; dedup by nama; mobile-only phone edges.
`scripts/process_garansi_season2.py` — document + BatchProcessor runner.
Template `data_nasabah_kredit` — kartu kredit / deposito / supply toko.
Diproses: Scribd `808609869/Garansi-ke-season-2` — 3,458 persons. Doc `01KSD13B8GSVYC3ANHV1ETTXJW`. OSINT skipped (3,333 phones — batch terpisah).
